title: Hitchhiking to the Edge of Sanity
original_title: Hitchhiking to the Edge of Sanity
overview: A look at the turbulent social upheaval of the early 1970s which follows an idealistic writer and his soon-to-be-married photographer friend as they set out to find their purpose via a terrifying road trip across the Sahara Desert.

trailers.title: Official Trailer
trailers.channel_name: Hitchhiking To The Edge Of Sanity
